name: Berkey Ceramic Filters
description: Berkey Ceramic filters are gravity-fed water filtration and purification systems available in different sizes.

taxonomy.sub_category: Berkey Ceramic Filters Updated on January 11, 2024 · Created on August 4, 2019 Berkey Ceramic Filters Berkey Ceramic filters are gravity-fed water filtration and purification systems available in different sizes. Developed By New Millennium Concepts, Ltd Tested By Analytical Services, Inc Biological Consulting Services of North Florida ENVIROTECH LABORATORIES INC QUALITY FILTER TESTING LABORATORY, LLC Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Berkey ceramic filters are free-standing (tabletop), portable, gravity-fed water filtration and purification systems manufactured in the USA and commercialized by New Millennium Concepts, Ltd. They are available in different sizes (models) to serve individuals, families or large groups and for use during travel, outdoor activities, or unexpected emergencies. They are designed to remove up to 99.999% of viruses and 99.9999% of pathogenic bacteria, and to remove or dramatically reduce protozoa and many harmful chemicals such as trihalomethanes, inorganic minerals, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, pesticides, VOCs, petroleum products, perfluorinated chemicals, rust, silt, sediment and radiologicals. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $730.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations Berkey ceramic Filters are currently distributed by Authorized international Dealers, in north America (US and Canada (14 dealers), Puerto Rico and carribbean Islands (1 dealer), Europe(21 dealers), Middle East (2 dealers), Asia (4 dealers), Australia and New Zealand(8 dealers) and South Africa (1 dealer) and South America (Peru). Berkey Filters USA and Big Berkey Water filters are the main dealers. Historically, Berkey filtration systems have been used by The Royal household in England, populations in over 140 countries worldwide, relief Organizations such as UNICEF, the Peace Corps, Missionary organizations and Red Cross Societies Internationally and by hunters, campers, adventurers and explorers. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Kohler Clarity Water Filter , Safi Water Filters , Rainfresh MP4U Gravity Filter , Rainfresh P2S Siphon Water Filter , British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit , Stéfani Filtro Flex , Tulip Siphon Filter , and Tulip Table Top Filter . Regions Africa, Asia, Australia-New Zealand Region, Caribbean, Europe, Middle East, North America, Southern Africa Countries Albania, Andorra, Austria, Belgium, Brunei, Bulgaria, Canada, China, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Gibraltar, Greece, Guernsey, Hong Kong, Hungary, India, Indonesia, Ireland, Israel, Italy, Japan, Jersey, Korea (South), Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Macau, Malaysia, Malta, Monaco, Netherlands, Norway, Philippines, Poland, Portugal, Puerto Rico, Romania, Russia, San Marino, Singapore, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Taiwan, Thailand, Turkey, United Kingdom, United States, Vietnam Manufacturing/Building Method Envirogard Products Ltd. manufactures the ceramic filter cartridges, the buckets, spigots, and other components are manufactured separately and shipped together or obtained locally and assembled on-site. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Berkey water purification systems, accessories, and other products are sold online, in market or in stores through a network of Authorized Berkey Dealers worldwide. Distributions to Date Status Approximate number is unknown but it is at least in the hundreds given that NMCL has a global network of hundreds of Authorized Berkey® Dealers that has grown since the business began in 1998. Interview with representative Type of filter Ceramic candle filter Primary material of construction All Berkey filter chambers are constructed of highly polished AISI 304 stainless steel, except for the Berkey Light system which is made of non-BPA/BPS co-polyester. Black Berkey ® Purification ceramic Elements have a carbon core and are silver impregnated. Additives None, all of the components used to manufacture the Black Black Berkey® Purification Elements are food grade products. Interview with representative Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 1 – 26 gallons (3.8-98.4 L/hour) depending on the filter size and when it is dully configurated with the maximum number of elements. Bacteria reduction Up to log 6 (99.9999%)of pathogenic bacteria Virus reduction Up to log 5 (99.999%) Protozoa reduction > log 4 (99.99%) Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction >87.5 % removal of Arsenic, chromium, cadmium, molybdenum, vanadium, antimony, selenium, chromium VI and mercury. Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) This filter has been tested under 4.5 NTU Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) <.10 (> 97.8%) Maintenance schedule Black Berkey™ purification elements are re-cleanable. If the time it takes for the water to filter into the lower chamber substantially decreases, they should be removed, and held under cleaning running water while scrubbing lightly with a ScotchBrite® pad or toothbrush. More on how to maintain the system properly here. Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) Black Berkey® Purification Elements have a life expectancy of up to 3,000 gallons of water per element. Safe water storage integration 0.95 L to 22.7 L, depending on filter size Design Specifications Berkey ® Systems come in 7 different sizes: Go kit, Light, Travel, Big, Royal, Imperial and Crown Berkey ® System. Each system consists of an upper and lower stainless steel chamber (except for the Light Berkey ® System which is make of non-BPA/BPS co-polyester). The filtering process is performed by Black Berkey® Purification Elements which come standard in pairs in all systems (except for the Go Berkey® Kit which comes with one element) and can be added in pairs up to 8 elements to speed up purification. Sizes of Berkey Filters with number of Black Berkey® Purification Elements. To use, water is poured from any source into the top chamber of the system, and purified water is dispensed from the lower chamber through a spigot. Depending on filter size, normal everyday use ranges from 1 to 12 people and up to 625 people during emergency situations. Storage capacity can range from 0.95 L to 22.7 L and average flow rate is between 3.8 L/hours and 98.4 L /hours. Dimensions: Go Berkey ® kit: 14¨x 4¨ (355.6 x 101.6mm); 2.4 Lb (weight empty); 0.95 L of storage capacity; 3.8 L/hour of average flow rate . Light Berkey ® System: 26.5¨x 9¨; 8 Lb (weight empty); 10.4 L of storage capacity; 15.2 – 26.5 L/hour of average flow rate. Travel Berkey ® System: 18¨x 7.5¨; 7 Lb (weight empty); 5.7 L of storage capacity; 10.4 L/hour of average flow rate. Big Berkey ® System: 19.25¨x 9¨; 7 Lb (weight empty); 8.5 L of storage capacity; 13.3 – 26.5 L/hours of average flow rate. Royal Berkey ® System: 23 x 9.5¨; 8 Lb (weight empty); 12.3 L of storage capacity; 15.1 – 26.5 L/hour of average flow rate. Imperial Berkey ® System: 26¨x 10¨; 10 Lb (weight empty); 17 L of storage capacity; 20.8 – 62.5 L/hours of average flow rate. Crown Berkey ® System: 30¨x 11¨; 12 Lb (weight empty); 22.7 L of storage capacity; 24.6 – 98.4 L/hours of average flow rate. Product Schematics Technical Support Costumers are asked to visit Berkey® by NMCL Customer Support & Service for defective products requiring repair or replacement under the terms of New Millennium Concepts product0s Limited Warranty and return policy. Replacement Components Replacements components include the Black Berkey® Purification Elements and other items, as well as accessories or enhancements such as the Berkey PF-2™ Fluoride and Arsenic Reduction Elements that may be installed on each Black Berkey® Purification Element. Lifecycle Each pair of Black Berkey® Purification Elements has a typical expected use of about 5-8 years (up to 6,000 gallons of treated water) before needing replacement and includes a 2 years limited prorated warranty. Other components such as the Berkey PF-2™ Fluoride and Arsenic Reduction Filters and all Berkey® accessories include a 6 month warranty. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Berkey® systems equipped with Black Berkey®Purification Elements are designed to accomodate size of the user’s space, number of people served and water use. They are also made to remove up to 99.999% of viruses and 99.9999% of pathogenic bacteria, and to remove or dramatically reduce protozoa, trihalomethanes, inorganic minerals, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, pesticides, VOCs, petroleum products, perfluorinated chemicals, rust, silt, sediment and even radiologicals. Designer specific performane targets include: powerful (filter), effortless, convenient,portable, durable, economical and proven. Vetted Performance Status Black Berkey Purification elements have been tested for biological and microbiological removal efficiency by Biological Consulting Services of North Florida Inc. and ANALYTICAL SERVICES, INC. and for chemical and physical contaminants reduction and/or removal by ENVIROTEK LABORATORIES, INC., QUALITY FILTER TESTING LABORATORY, LLC. and by Water Filter Labs. For a list of contaminant filtration specifications click here. For the link to laboratory tests results performed see here. Safety Potential hazards would be those related to the use of this product when damaged and is in need of replacement. When the carbon of the black filtering elements becomes exhausted, although the ceramic shell will continue to remove pathogenic bacteria and turbidity, the filter will be unable to reduce chemicals, foul taste and odors of the source water. Complementary Technical Systems The Berkey Purification systems do no need extra component to assist function. However there are accessories that can be bought to improve function and purification such as the Berkey PF-2™ Fluoride and Arsenic Reduction Elements. Evaluation methods The Black Berkey® Purification Elements have been evaluated for removal of bacteria, virus, cysts, turbidity, protozoa, trihalomethanes, inorganic minerals, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, pesticides, VOCs, petroleum products, perfluorinated chemicals, and radiologicals in certified third-party laboratories and independently by Water Filter Labs forbelement reduction( Al, Cu, As,St, Cd,Cs, Hg, Pb, U).
